creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
*** Configuration armv6-portbld-freebsd10.0 is obsolete.
*** Specify --enable-obsolete to build it anyway.
*** Support will be REMOVED in the next major release of GCC,
*** unless a maintainer comes forward.
gmake[4]: *** [configure-gcc] Error 1
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc/work/build'

I'm not particularly interested in this port.
I was pulled in to build something else.

I don't undertand the message.
Does this mean that in 11-stable lang/gcc will
be gcc48?

Or does this mean that lang/gcc will be removed
as a whole in 11-stable armv6?

Please explain
